chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3497 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.14390/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 03.01.2023 Mr. Imam Ali Chang, Advocate for petitioners along-with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along-with Inspector Tufail Shaikh on behalf of legal branch Tando Muhammad Khan and SIP Zameer Ahmed P.S Shaikh Bhirkio Tando Muhammad Khan. == Mr. Haji Khan Brohi, Advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.4 which is taken on record. I.O of the case has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 under section 161 Cr.P.C in which she while reiterating the same facts as mentioned in memo of petition has categorically stated that no one has abducted her and she with her own accord had contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 under valid Nikahnama. The I.O submits that in the light of her statement, he will file his report before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case in “C” Class. He shall do so within three days. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above. Police official present is directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
